name: The Living Flame
descriptionTemplate:
At turn start, randomly apply 1 stack of {Fiamma} to 1 Kathigu-Ra's Command Card in hand.
For each stack of {Fiamma} consumed by Kathigu-Ra, gain 1 stack of {Combust}.
When {Combust} reaches 10 stacks, gain 2 Arithmetica and upgrade all {Solarflare} to {Hyperflare}.
